title: Cuneiform Tablet #0573: Old Akkadian Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
